In your opinion, what should be improved, added or changed for the LIFUS training program?

column14: During high workload phases, guidance came late. Earlier cues would help manage workload better.
Communication was clear but sometimes directive. More two-way discussion would improve understanding., Different instructors gave different expectations. More standardization would help.

column56: Clearer expectations of training progress would be ideal (fixed targets). Thank you training team for listening to training and operating pilots!
